description_long: This cowshed is a rectangular, industrial-style building with a robust steel frame supporting a gabled roof. The roof features three large, glass-paneled skylights, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front facade is constructed from a mix of brick and concrete, with two large, weathered metal roll-up doors providing access. The rear and side walls are primarily concrete with large, frosted glass windows, giving the structure a utilitarian yet modern appearance. Exposed steel trusses and beams are visible beneath the roof, emphasizing the building's sturdy construction. The overall look is functional, with clear provisions for ventilation and light, suitable for housing livestock in an urban or peri-urban environment.
description: A sturdy, industrial cowshed with a gabled roof, large skylights, brick and concrete walls, and metal roll-up doors. The design is utilitarian with ample windows and exposed steel framing.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large metal roll-up doors, brick and concrete facade, and exposed steel trusses under the gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting three large frosted glass windows and the glass-paneled skylights on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with two partially open roll-up doors, concrete walls, and visible steel roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view with three large frosted glass windows and a clear view of the skylights and interior trusses.
attribute_window_presence: three large rectangular frosted glass windows on the side/rear, three glass skylights on the roof
